message:
fix: resolve clippy warnings in CI

- Remove unused imports (ArrayD, Axis) in presyn.rs
- Replace deprecated py.allow_threads with py.detach
- Add Default impl for Tokenizer (new_without_default warning)
- Replace manual_clamp patterns with .clamp() calls
- Fix redundant closures with direct function references
- Flatten iterator results instead of manual if-let in loops
- Use is_none_or instead of map_or for Option checks
- Add type alias for complex return types in moe.rs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
